# Steady Nutrition Coaching

> 1:1 nutrition coaching for busy professionals in their 30s-50s. Steady fixes the root causes of low energy, inflammation, blood sugar swings, and bloating through real, whole food - not diets, macros, or trends.

Founder and coach: Marliis Schneider - a former professional rower (national team at junior, U23, and elite level; NCAA Division I at USC) who resolved her own chronic inflammation and bloating by returning to whole foods, adding dairy back, and removing seed oils and ultra-processed food.

## Core pages
- [Start Here](start-here.html): The best first path for new visitors — quiz, key guides, then book a call.
- [Home](index.html): What Steady is and how to start.
- [Journal](journal.html): Short notes, tips, and site updates.
- [Coaching](coaching.html): The Steady Method, programs, and transparent pricing ($199/mo).
- [About](about.html): Marliis Schneider's story and coaching philosophy.
- [Learn library](learn.html): All educational guides in one place.
- [FAQ](faq.html): Common questions about cost, format (online, Central Time), and how it works.
- [Symptom quiz](quiz.html): Find your likely root cause in 60 seconds.
- [Book a call](contact.html): Free 20-minute discovery call.

## Guides
- [The Whole-Food Reset](learn-wholefoods.html): The back-to-basics framework - what to keep, what to cut.
- [Blood Sugar](learn-bloodsugar.html): Why the 3pm crash happens and how to flatten the curve.
- [Inflammation](learn-inflammation.html): How seed oils drive chronic inflammation, and what to eat instead.
- [Protein](learn-protein.html): How much you actually need and where to get it.
- [Bloating](learn-bloating.html): Reading the signal instead of cutting more foods.
- [Eating Out & Travel](learn-eatingout.html): A playbook for restaurants, airports, hotels, and client dinners.
- [Movement](learn-movement.html): Why a 10-minute walk after meals beats the gym for blood sugar.
- [Blood Sugar 101](learn-diabetes.html): How blood sugar works and the three levers you control; for anyone, especially with a family history of diabetes.
- [Is It Really Gluten?](learn-gluten.html): Why many "gluten" reactions are actually to processed food and seed oils.
- [Dairy: Friend, Not Enemy](learn-dairy.html): Why cutting dairy is usually the wrong move, and who genuinely needs to avoid it.
- [Read a Food Label in 10 Seconds](learn-label.html): A fast method to spot seed oils, mystery ingredients, and hidden sugar.
- [Why Am I So Tired All the Time?](learn-fatigue.html): The four fixable causes of everyday fatigue — blood sugar, protein, inflammation, and movement.
- [How to Beat Sugar Cravings](learn-cravings.html): Why you crave sugar and the real fixes that quiet cravings without willpower.
- [The Anti-Inflammatory Foods List](learn-antiinflammatory.html): The real foods that calm inflammation and how to build them into meals.

## Recipes & resources
- [Real Meals](recipes.html): Simple, blood-sugar-friendly, seed-oil-free recipes (breakfasts, dinners, snacks).
- [Free 1-Week Meal Plan](mealplan.html): A printable 7-day whole-food, blood-sugar-friendly plan with a grocery list.
